demo.title: ID Encryption & Obfuscation
demo.subtitle: High security & clean URLs for Next.js
demo.intro: This page demonstrates the implementation of two ID security techniques that have been integrated into this template.
demo.obfuscationDesc: Converts sequential database integer IDs into short, unique, and URL-friendly strings. Perfect for hiding IDs from being guessed.
demo.encryptionDesc: High-security, authenticated, and tamper-proof AES-GCM encryption. Runs exclusively on the server (Server Component / Action).
demo.errorInvalidNumber: Please enter a valid positive number.
